realtime_memories.content: Conda env: always use conda install (not pip) in base env. Obsidian MCP: Vault at ~/obsidian-vault (bind-mount from /mnt/c/.../Programming Vault). Folder: ' Claude Notes (MCP Server)' (leading space). CLAUDE.md architecture: ~/CLAUDE.md universal, project-specific CLAUDE.md in each root. Custom skills: /resume, /pipeline, /checkpoint. Alias: cq='claude -p'. LF line endings for shell scripts in WSL2.

dashboard_interface_project: ~/projects/dashboard_interface_project/. FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + React/TS/Vite. Conda env: dashboard-backend. Domain: B&R Capital multifamily RE (Cabana on 99th + Tempe Metro = owned properties, 15 CoStar Submarket Clusters). Proforma files at /mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/B&R Capital/... (WSL2). Dev command: npm run dev:all. Login: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!!. Auth: JWT via authStore (fetch client), backend RBAC guards (require_viewer/analyst/manager/admin). Tests: vitest (frontend) + pytest with SQLite in-memory (backend). auto_auth fixture in conftest.py for auth-protected endpoint tests. Axios fully removed (1f3fad1). DB: postgresql://postgres:postgres123@localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data.

Key codebase patterns: (1) Zod schemas parse snake_case to camelCase. (2) _enrich_deals_with_extraction() adds ~26 fields from ExtractedValue table. (3) SQLite tests need explicit created_at/updated_at (no server_default). (4) All datetime: datetime.now(UTC). (5) StrEnum + SQLAlchemy: use values_callable AND native_enum=False for varchar columns. (6) Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). (7) ONE API client: src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). (8) Mock extract_from_file with **kw to accept validate kwarg. (9) Token blacklist uses async Redis with lazy _ensure_redis() init. (10) asyncpg is STRICT about types. (11) Redis state persists between test runs. (12) Frontend pageSize must not exceed backend Query(le=N) constraints. (13) Pydantic serializes Decimal as string — Zod price fields use z.union. (14) Always use safeParse (not parse) when mapping arrays. (15) /deals/kanban endpoint is separate from /deals list.

Dashboard status (2026-03-26): HEAD at b68edee on main. 3,433 backend + 1,312 frontend = 4,745 total tests. Architecture Review v3 Sprint 1 COMPLETE (5 epics, 24 stories, 109 new tests). Sprint 2 IN PROGRESS: Team C (dead-letter) done (37 tests), Teams A+B running. Next after Sprint 2: extract 28 ungrouped files, production hosting.

MF Market Ranking: ~/projects/mf_market_ranking. Phase 1 enhancement IN PROGRESS (2026-03-18). Conda env: mf_market_rankings. 556 tests passing. Next: Phase 2 (Class B differentiation), Phase 3 (Monte Carlo). DO NOT TOUCH: ensemble weights, training pipeline.
User prefers: transparent honest feedback over diplomatic hedging. Commit style: conventional commits with scope. USE AGENT TEAMS for parallel debugging.
Consolidated back to 6 — removed noise (truncated responses, task notifications, ephemeral messages), updated project_status to reflect Sprint 2 progress. Teams A and B still running.

**Team A complete** — Download Retry + Security Verification (UR-009, UR-026):
- 3 new files, 2 modified
- **78 tests** added (46 download retry + 32 security)
- Retry with exponential backoff, 403
